chinese_text: 振鷺于飛，于彼西雝。我客戾止，亦有斯容。
translation_text:
A flock of egrets is flying,
About the marsh there in the west.
My visitors came,
With an (elegant) carriage like those birds.

chinese_text: 在彼無惡，在此無斁。庶幾夙夜，以永終譽。
translation_text:
There, (in their states), not disliked,
Here, (in Kâu), never tired of;—
They
are sure, day and night,
To perpetuate their fame.
